note: seq=22: enable Brain STEERING (ATLAS_BRAIN_WRITE_PRIORITY=1) -> reprioritize enrich_queue.priority so high-value/ICP records enrich first. Rewrites atlas-brain.service with the env, daemon-reload, start (immediate steering pass). Brain already active+ranking (seq-21).

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS V2 Smart Brain (EV queue prioritization; STEERING ON)
After=network-online.target postgresql.service
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=10
Environment=ATLAS_DB_ENV=/etc/atlas/db.env
Environment=ATLAS_AUTOPULL_CONF=/etc/atlas/autopull.env
Environment=ATLAS_BRAIN_WRITE_PRIORITY=1
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/brain/atlas_smart_brain.py --once
TimeoutStartSec=10min
